examples.title: Pseudocode: EVM Execution
examples.code:
BEGIN
 LOAD contract_code
 DECODE calldata
 INIT stack, memory, storage
 WHILE has_opcodes DO
 FETCH opcode
 EXECUTE opcode
 UPDATE stack, memory, storage
 END WHILE
 UPDATE world_state
 RETURN result
END
examples.explanation: The EVM executes bytecode opcodes in a loop, updating the stack, memory, and storage as needed.

examples.title: Python: EVM Simulator
examples.explanation: This Python code simulates a basic EVM execution process, including opcode execution and stack management.
